title: Ping-Pong.
content:
Sing a song of Ping-pong,
        Fast away he ran:
    "Come along," said Ping-pong,
        "Catch me if you can!"

    Sing a song of Ping-pong,
        Racquet and a ball:
    "Come along," said Ping-pong,
        "You can't run at all!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Richard Hunter delivers a powerful performance in "Ping-Pong."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
